fields.label: Debug mode
fields.description: Enable verbose debug logging. Disable in production (live mode).

fields.label: Default parse mode
fields.description: Telegram parse_mode applied to every outbound message.

fields.label: Dev poll interval (seconds)
fields.description: Cadence of the dev long-poll worker between getUpdates passes. Dev/no-public-HTTPS transport only; the webhook is the production path.

fields.label: Public base URL
fields.description: HTTPS base URL Telegram pushes webhooks to (used by Set webhook). Leave empty in dev (use the long-poll worker).
